Risk Description: Because of only 34% project completion against 100% expected baseline (per SOW and MBR), there is a risk that the fixed-price milestone payments will be delayed or contested, which could lead to cash flow disruption, contract renegotiation, and reputational damage with Axos Bank.
Tech Stack: .NET 8, Angular 18, SQL Server 2019, AWS Bedrock Claude Sonnet, Rollfi APIs
Potential Impact: Major schedule slippage impacting go-live, financial penalties, client dissatisfaction, potential contract termination

SLA Metric: Defect Density: ~22.19 bugs/KLOC vs 2 expected; Leakage: 4.8%
Risk Description: Because of defect density at ~22.19 bugs per KLOC (11x higher than the 2 bugs/KLOC target) and defect leakage at 4.8% (near the 5% threshold), there is a risk that production deployment will introduce critical defects, which could lead to system failures, data integrity issues, regulatory non-compliance, and significant rework costs.
Potential Impact: Production incidents, customer-facing failures, compliance violations, emergency patches, increased support costs

SLA Metric: UAT paused; revised timelines pending approval
Risk Description: Because UAT for Release 0.4+0.8 has been paused and requires complete readiness assessment (per Decision D-005), and revised timelines are pending Axos approval, there is a risk that UAT delays will cascade into subsequent milestones, which could lead to missed go-live dates, extended project duration, and increased costs beyond the fixed-price agreement.
Tech Stack: Bank Accounts, Vendors, Replacement, Delegations, Doc Vault, Reporting
Potential Impact: Go-live delay, milestone payment delays, budget overrun, contractual disputes, customer onboarding delays

Risk Description: Because the project depends on Rollfi (third-party payroll provider) for 19 UI screens and 59 APIs, and any constraints in Rollfi's offerings must go through change management (per SOW Section A.b), there is a risk that Rollfi API changes, delays, or feature gaps will block development, which could lead to scope changes, schedule delays, and additional costs not covered under the fixed-price contract.
Potential Impact: Integration failures, functional gaps, rework, change order costs, delayed payroll functionality deployment

SLA Metric: 3 HLDs pending; NACHA APIs pending from Axos
Risk Description: Because banking integration with Axos Bank has 3 pending HLDs (Funds Transfer, Wire Confirmations, ACH Confirmations) and NACHA APIs are still pending from Axos (per MBR), there is a risk that integration testing cannot proceed on schedule, which could lead to incomplete functional parity with the Current Zenith System and delayed production deployment.
Tech Stack: Banking APIs, Entitlement, BAI2, NACHA, ACH, Wire Transfer
Potential Impact: Functional gaps in banking features, UAT delays, production readiness failure, SLA breaches, customer impact

Risk Description: Because data models for Deposits, Receipts, and Commissions have gone through multiple changes resulting in rework (per MBR Module Readiness), there is a risk that further data model revisions will cascade into additional development and testing rework, which could lead to schedule delays, increased defect rates, and cost overruns.
Potential Impact: Development rework, testing delays, defect introduction, schedule slippage, budget impact

SLA Metric: Network downtime, DNS issues, AKS upgrade pending
Risk Description: Because of recurring network downtime impacting DEV/QA environments, DNS change issues in AAVA 2.0, and pending AKS cluster upgrade to 1.33 (ETA 3/31), there is a risk that development and testing activities will be blocked, which could lead to schedule delays, incomplete testing, and production deployment risks.
Tech Stack: AWS, Azure AKS, AAVA 2.0, DNS, BurpSuite, SonarQube
Potential Impact: Development blockage, testing delays, environment unavailability, deployment risks, team productivity loss

Risk Description: Because performance testing is pending (scheduled 3/3) and stringent SLAs require UI page rendering <=10 seconds and API response <=3 seconds, and realistic data volume testing has not been conducted, there is a risk that the system will fail to meet performance requirements, which could lead to code refactoring, infrastructure upgrades, schedule delays, and SLA breaches.
Potential Impact: Performance failures, code refactoring costs, infrastructure upgrades, schedule delays, SLA penalties

SLA Metric: Reporting scope under review; SAVE AS approach approved
Risk Description: Because the Reporting Center scope is being revisited and replanned based on ongoing POC reviews and prioritization (per Issue tracking), and the SAVE AS approach was only recently approved (2/20), there is a risk that reporting requirements will change or expand, which could lead to scope creep, rework, and delays in Milestone 1 delivery.
Tech Stack: Power BI, Angular, Paginated Reports, AWS Bedrock
Potential Impact: Scope changes, rework, schedule delays, additional costs, client expectation misalignment

SLA Metric: Change Management and Accrued Hours Depletion
Risk Title: Because the SOW provides 300 Accrued Hours (25 hours/month) for change management at no additional cost, and change requests are being tracked, there is a risk that Accrued Hours will be depleted faster than anticipated due to high change volume, which could lead to additional hourly charges ($60-120/hour) or fixed-price quotes, increasing project costs beyond the contracted amount.
Likelihood: Budget overrun, unexpected costs, contract renegotiation, client disputes, margin erosion

Risk Description: Because API regression automation is only 22% complete (per MBR metrics) and there are 300+ APIs to automate, there is a risk that insufficient regression coverage will allow defects to leak into production, which could lead to integration failures, data corruption, and emergency production fixes.
Tech Stack: Postman, API Testing, JIRA, Automation Agents
Potential Impact: Production defects, integration failures, data integrity issues, emergency fixes, increased support costs

Risk Title: AI Model Integration and Cost Risk
Risk Description: Because Billie Part 2 uses AWS Bedrock Claude Sonnet 4.5 LLM (per Decision D-021) and cost/CISO approvals were recently secured, there is a risk that LLM usage costs will exceed projections or AI model performance will not meet accuracy requirements, which could lead to budget overruns, rework, or scope reduction.
Tech Stack: AWS Bedrock, Claude Sonnet 4.5, LLM, OCR, Invoice Processing
Potential Impact: Budget overrun, AI performance issues, rework, scope changes, client dissatisfaction

Risk Description: Because the project has experienced attrition of key resources (per historical risk patterns: 2x DB Architects, Solution Architect, Product Owner, Delivery Leader, Testing Lead), and 15 additional testers and 15 additional developers have been onboarded recently (per Go Green Plan), there is a risk that further attrition or inadequate knowledge transfer will disrupt delivery, which could lead to schedule delays, quality issues, and increased costs.
Potential Impact: Knowledge loss, delivery disruption, schedule delays, quality degradation, increased onboarding costs

SLA Metric: BurpSuite results pending action; SonarQube replaced
Risk Description: Because BurpSuite security scan results have been extracted but not yet acted upon (per Open Items), and SonarQube has been replaced by BurpSuite (per Decision D-010), there is a risk that unresolved security vulnerabilities will be deployed to production, which could lead to data breaches, regulatory non-compliance, and reputational damage.
Tech Stack: BurpSuite, Security Testing, RBAC, Token Management
Potential Impact: Security breaches, data leaks, regulatory penalties, reputational damage, remediation costs

Risk Title: Data Migration Strategy and Execution Risk
Risk Description: Because the data migration strategy from Legacy Zenith to NexLedgr is not yet finalized (per Risk tracking), and the ability to onboard 5 beta customers at go-live depends on successful data migration, there is a risk that data migration will be delayed or incomplete, which could lead to customer onboarding delays, data integrity issues, and go-live postponement.
Tech Stack: Python, C#, SQL Server, Data Migration Tools
Potential Impact: Customer onboarding delays, data integrity failures, go-live postponement, manual data entry fallback, client dissatisfaction
